title: Redundant React fragments should be removed
description:
Redundant React fragments should be removedAnalyze your codeadaptability-distinctmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEreactWhy is this an issue?More InfoReact fragments are a feature in React that allows you to group multiple elements together without adding an extra DOM element. They are a way to return multiple elements from a component’s render method without requiring a wrapping parent element.However, a fragment is redundant if it contains only one child, or if it is the child of an HTML element.<>; // Noncompliant: The fragment has only one child

<>foo

; // Noncompliant: The fragment is the child of the HTML element 'p'You can safely remove the redundant fragment while preserving the original behaviour.;

foo
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

noncompliant:
<>; // Noncompliant: The fragment has only one child

<>foo

; // Noncompliant: The fragment is the child of the HTML element 'p'

checks.message: Consider removing redundant React fragment if it contains only one child.
